name: Ray Abrams
abstract: Ray Abrams (January 23, 1920 – July 1992) was an American jazz and jump blues tenor saxophonist, born Ray Abramson in New York City. His younger brother was jazz drummer Lee Abrams.

concerts.label: Kool Jazz Festival: Benny Carter and Illinois Jacquet

about_quotes.speaker: Lou Donaldson
about_quotes.evidence: Actually, Ray Copeland was working in that band. ... Ray Abrams played saxophone...
about_quotes.doc_title: Lou Donaldson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Dan Morgenstern
about_quotes.evidence: There was Ray Abrams on tenor [saxophone]. He was the other tenor player.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dan Morgenstern — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
